data.title: Hick's Law
data.description: WhatsApp minimizes user options to enhance decision speed.
data.technical_spec: Streamlined UI with essential navigation and action buttons.

data.title: Fitts's Law
data.description: Design is optimized for quick access to frequently used functions.
data.technical_spec: Important actions like send and call are large and within reach.

data.title: Law of Proximity
data.description: Related items are grouped together to create a more intuitive interface.
data.technical_spec: Chats, status, and calls are segregated into easily accessible tabs.

data.title: Miller's Law
data.description: UI design accommodates the user’s ability to process 7±2 items at a time.
data.technical_spec: Limited number of chat options visible without scrolling.

data.title: Law of Prägnanz
data.description: WhatsApp uses a clean layout that eases user interaction.
data.technical_spec: Simple design with a focus on core communication functions.
